ARIA Child Roles Outside Required Parent Test Page

These elements use child roles that require a specific parent context, but are placed outside that parent.

role="tab" without a role="tablist" parent:

Overview
Details
History

role="option" without a role="listbox" parent:

Apple
Banana
Cherry

role="menuitem" without a role="menu" parent:

Cut
Copy
Paste

role="treeitem" without a role="tree" parent:

Root item
Child item

Back to index
